title: 'Go for It, Nakamura!' Anime Casts Shunsuke Takeuchi
content: Aniplex announced a new cast member for the television anime of Syundei 's Go for It, Nakamura! ( Ganbare! Nakamura-kun!! ) boys-love manga on Monday. Shunsuke Takeuchi will join the anime's cast as Kaoru Niō, a physical education teacher at Hoshimi High School.
author: ANN

title: 5 Great Overlooked Manga That Deserve an Anime Announcement
content: The anime industry is growing ever so rapidly, and fans are always on the lookout for the next big hit. Most of the anime are based on manga, and some are even adapted from light novels and video games.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action Tengu no Daidokoro Gets 3rd Season This Fall
content: BS-TBS announced on Monday that it is producing a third live-action season based on Ai Tanaka 's Tengu no Daidokoro (Tengu's Kitchen) manga. The new season will premiere on BS-TBS in the "Mokuyō Drama 23" time slot on Thursdays at 11:00 p.m. (10::00 a.m. EDT) this fall.
author: ANN

title: Acclaimed Shonen Anime Star Breaks Silence on Season 2 After 6 Years: “It Was a Complete Surprise to Us”
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and the lineup looks as exciting as ever. Like each quarter, Crunchyroll is adding dozens of series to its library and streaming new episodes weekly after the Japanese broadcast.
author: ComicBook

title: Yuu Nagira's 'Nanji, Hoshi no Gotoku' Novel Gets Live-Action Film on October 9
content: TOHO announced on Monday that it is producing a live-action film adaptation of Yuu Nagira 's Nanji, Hoshi no Gotoku (You Are Akin to the Stars) that will open in Japan on October 9.
author: ANN

title: Studio Ghibli’s Classics Get Surprise New Official Look For an Exciting Project
content: For decades since its establishment in 1985, Studio Ghibli has remained the most iconic animation studio when it comes to anime movies. Every film produced by the studio is famous for its striking visuals, rich storytelling, and deep emotional impact.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Shonen Jump Creator Breaks Silence on Anime’s Debut
content: The anime debut of a major Shonen Jump series, Akane-banash i , has finally been released, and it’s already receiving praise from fans for its exceptional story and animation. As one of the biggest Weekly Shonen Jump series, Akane-banashi has long grabbed the attention of fans in this season’s anime lineup.
author: ComicBook

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Opens Up About Major Change in Season 2: “A New Side of Her”
content: The exciting Season 2 of Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End reaches its conclusion after teasing the Golden Land Arc. The series continues the journey of Frieren and her party as they continue their travels to the North after Fern became a First Class Mage.
author: ComicBook

title: Major Crunchyroll Isekai Replaces Opening After Confirmed AI Use Controversy
content: One major Isekai franchise now streaming with Crunchyroll has fully replaced its opening sequence after confirming A.I. use and facing a huge backlash with fans. The Spring 2026 anime schedule is now in full gear as a new wave of anime has made their return with new episodes.
author: ComicBook

title: I’ve Been Waiting Years for This Promising Game (& It’s Getting an Anime)
content: When this game was first revealed many years ago, it immediately stood out and grabbed my attention. Even as its release date has shifted and updates slow down, that initial spark has stuck with me.
author: ComicBook
